query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query query_type="Search API" user_name={{user}}
| geoip remote_ip
| lookup asn,organization from asn://default on ip=remote_ip
| trim(concat(asn,"_",organization," ",country_name," ",city)) as asn_geo
| if (asn_geo matches /{{expected_asn_geo_regex}}/,"normal","exception") as location
| where location matches "{{show_asn_geo}}"

| count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned, sum(retrieved_message_count) as events by user_name,asn_geo,location
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb | fields -bytes_scanned
| concat(user_name," ",asn_geo) as %"user_asn_geo"
// summarize
| sum(searches)  as searches by %"user_asn_geo"
| compare with timeshift 7d 2 | sort %"user_asn_geo" asc

queryParameters.name: expected_asn_geo_regex
queryParameters.description: regular expression for expected asn geo strings

sources.dashboardName: Sumo Logic Login and API Activity
sources.panelTitle: Search Job API History by user asn_geo
rowContext: API Access Activity and Configuration Changes

variables.name: expected_asn_geo_regex
variables.values: regular expression for expected asn geo strings
